title: New feature in development: Sync events from monday.com to Github through the GitHub integration!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
NEW FEATURE IN DEVELOPMENT: SYNC EVENTS FROM MONDAY.COM TO GITHUB THROUGH THE GITHUB INTEGRATION

Attention to our software lovers and developers: We will soon support the ability to sync events from monday.com → GitHub

Right now, our GitHub integration only supports a one-way connection from GitHub to the monday.com platform… however, that’s all about to change… We’ve listened to your feedback and recognized that a growing number of workflows require a two-way sync; as such, we are currently developing this functionality so our monday.com dev users can establish a sync between monday.com back to GitHub!

Do we have any GitHub fans in the community who will welcome this release with open arms? Let us know in the comments below, and stay tuned
